channel.name: ORU_Routing

com.mirth.connect.plugins.javascriptrule.script: var obx8 = msg['OBX']['OBX.8']['OBX.8.1'].toString(); return obx8 == 'HH' || obx8 == 'LL' || obx8 == 'H' || obx8 == 'L';

properties.query: INSERT INTO lab_results (patient_id, patient_name, test_name, result_value, result_status, abnormal_flag, units, ordering_provider, provider_specialty, admission_status) VALUES (${patient_id}, ${patient_name}, ${test_name}, ${result_value}, ${result_status}, ${abnormal_flag}, ${units}, ${ordering_provider}, ${provider_specialty}, ${admission_status})

INSERT INTO lab_results (patient_id, patient_name, test_name, result_value, result_status, abnormal_flag, units, ordering_provider, provider_specialty, admission_status) VALUES (${patient_id}, ${patient_name}, ${test_name}, ${result_value}, ${result_status}, ${abnormal_flag}, ${units}, ${ordering_provider}, ${provider_specialty}, ${admission_status})

com.mirth.connect.plugins.javascriptrule.script: var obx8 = msg['OBX']['OBX.8']['OBX.8.1'].toString(); return obx8 == 'HH' || obx8 == 'LL' || obx8 == 'H' || obx8 == 'L';

channel.preprocessingScript: // Modify the message variable below to pre process data return message;
